sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Leidos to support over 4.7 million service members and families through Military OneSource – Company Announcement
feed.summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) has secured a four-year, $456 million contract from the General Services Administration to continue supporting Military OneSource. This program provides comprehensive well-being services, including confidential counseling, parenting resources, tax assistance, and spouse employment support, to over 4.7 million Department of War service members and their families. Leidos's involvement aligns with its NorthStar 2030 growth strategy, emphasizing its commitment to strengthening the health and readiness of military personnel.

feed.title: SPDR SSGA My2026 Municipal Bond ETF (MYMF) Chart and Price History 2026
feed.summary: This article provides the chart and price history for the SPDR SSGA My2026 Municipal Bond ETF (MYMF), including recent performance trends and historical daily data. As of April 28, 2026, the fund traded at $24.88 with a market cap of $11.20 million. The ETF has seen a 0.53% increase over the last 12 months, though it has experienced minor declines recently.

feed.title: MPLX LP To Go Ex-Dividend On May 8th, 2026 With 1.0765 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: This article announces that MPLX LP will go ex-dividend on May 8th, 2026. Shareholders as of this date can expect a dividend payment of 1.0765 USD per share. This information is crucial for investors tracking dividend payouts and ex-dividend dates for MPLX LP.

feed.title: DTE asks for $474 million rate hike from Michigan Public Service Commission
feed.summary: DTE Electric Company is seeking a $474 million rate hike from the Michigan Public Service Commission, just months after a previous $242.2 million increase was approved. Michigan Attorney General Dana Nessel plans to intervene, citing corporate greed and questioning DTE's statements regarding potential future rate hikes tied to an OpenAI data center. DTE attributes the request to infrastructure investments, reliability improvements, green power generation, and property tax increases, while acknowledging they paid zero federal income tax in 2025.

feed.title: Registration Is Now Open For Tribe Public's CEO Presentation and Q&A Webinar Event Titled "From FDA Wins to Scaling Manufacturing - What Investors Should Watch." Featuring Modular Medical CEO - Friday, May 1, 2026
feed.summary: Modular Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: MODD) announced that its CEO, Jeb Besser, will present at Tribe Public's webinar "From FDA Wins to Scaling Manufacturing - What Investors Should Watch" on Friday, May 1, 2026. The event will focus on Modular Medical's newly FDA-cleared Pivot insulin patch pump, designed to make insulin delivery more accessible and affordable for the 4.8 million Americans with diabetes. Investors are encouraged to register to learn about the company's commercial and manufacturing timelines, as well as its strategy to target the large underserved market of individuals currently using multiple daily injections.

feed.title: Idex Releases Q1 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Idex Corporation reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, surpassing Wall Street expectations with adjusted earnings of $2.00 per share against a $1.79 forecast. The company achieved $886.9 million in revenue, a 9.0% increase year-over-year, driven largely by its Health & Science Technologies segment. Idex also provided full-year adjusted EPS guidance between $8.35 and $8.55, reflecting confidence in its continued performance.

feed.title: General Dynamics Releases Q1 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: General Dynamics Corporation exceeded analyst expectations in Q1 2026, reporting diluted earnings of $4.10 per share, significantly beating the $3.79 consensus. The company's revenue reached $13.48 billion, a 10.3% increase from Q1 2025, driven by strong defense demand and a booming Marine Systems segment. Wall Street maintains confidence in the stock with a largely positive analyst consensus.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials Releases Q1 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials Company reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, exceeding Wall Street expectations with adjusted earnings of $1.35 per share against an estimated $1.13. The company's revenue reached $1.76 billion, a 7.4% increase year-over-year, driven by robust performance in its Aggregates segment. This positive performance was attributed to resilient demand for building materials and steady construction activity.

feed.title: PPG Industries, Inc. 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NYSE:PPG) 2026-04-29
feed.summary: PPG Industries, Inc. (NYSE:PPG) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with an EPS of $1.83 beating estimates by $0.06 and revenue of $3.93 billion exceeding expectations by $83.77 million, marking a 6.68% year-over-year increase. The company published a slide deck in conjunction with their earnings call. This presentation provides details on their financial performance for the first quarter.

feed.title: ADP (NASDAQ:ADP) Beats Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) exceeded Wall Street's revenue and profit expectations in Q1 CY2026, reporting a 7% year-on-year sales increase to $5.94 billion and a non-GAAP EPS of $3.37. The company demonstrated strong long-term revenue and EPS growth, with stable operating margins and benefits from share buybacks. The stock reacted positively to the news, trading up 3.7%.

feed.title: Only 20% use insulin pumps. Modular Medical plans a May 1 CEO webinar
feed.summary: Modular Medical (NASDAQ: MODD) announced a free webinar titled "From FDA Wins to Scaling Manufacturing - What Investors Should Watch" featuring CEO Jeb Besser on May 1, 2026. The webinar will discuss the company's Pivot tubeless insulin patch pump, which received FDA 510(k) clearance, and its commercialization and manufacturing timelines. This event comes as only 20% of the 4.8 million insulin-dependent diabetics in the U.S. currently use an insulin pump, highlighting a significant market opportunity for Modular Medical's innovative device.

feed.title: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC Lowers Position in The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. $GS
feed.summary: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC reduced its stake in The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. by 35.0% in the fourth quarter, selling 2,530 shares and holding 4,704 shares valued at $4.135 million. Despite this, institutional investors collectively own 71.21% of the company's stock. Recent analyst ratings for Goldman Sachs show a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $922.71, while the company continues to engage in strategic investments and face market-level research cautions.

feed.title: U.S. FDA Grants Priority Review of New Drug Application for Gilead’s Once-Daily HIV Treatment of Bictegravir Plus Lenacapavir
feed.summary: The U.S. FDA has granted priority review to Gilead Sciences' New Drug Application (NDA) for bictegravir 75 mg/lenacapavir 50 mg (BIC/LEN), a new once-daily single-tablet regimen for HIV treatment in virologically suppressed adults. If approved, this combination would be the smallest single-tablet regimen for HIV treatment and the first studied in adults with virological suppression on complex multi-tablet regimens. The PDUFA action date is set for August 27, 2026, with the NDA submission supported by positive Phase 3 data from the ARTISTRY-1 and ARTISTRY-2 trials.

feed.title: First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) Stock Rating Upgraded by Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) stock rating from a "strong sell" to a "hold." The company has received mixed ratings from other analysts, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average target price of $243.49. Recent insider selling activity by the CTO and CEO was also noted, alongside institutional investors modifying their holdings.

feed.title: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC Cuts Stake in The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC reduced its stake in The TJX Companies (NYSE:TJX) by 12.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 10,984 shares and now owning 76,896 shares valued at $11.81 million. Other institutional investors have increased their holdings, while CEO Ernie Herrman sold 30,000 shares for over $4.8 million. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, exceeding analyst expectations, and increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Simplicity Wealth LLC Buys 1,270 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
feed.summary: Simplicity Wealth LLC increased its stake in Costco (COST) by 13.5% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 1,270 shares to hold a total of 10,652 shares valued at $9.186 million. Costco recently raised its quarterly dividend to $1.47, and its latest quarterly results surpassed analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Costco with an average price target of $1,045.97.

feed.title: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC Sells 5,246 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST

The article also covers recent insider selling, analyst ratings resulting in a "Moderate Buy" consensus, the company's financial performance, and a recent dividend increase.

feed.title: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC Trims Stock Holdings in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM

The article also details recent insider selling by BlackRock directors and COO, analyst ratings, and various market sentiments surrounding the company, including its financial performance and strategy with crypto products.

feed.title: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC Sells 17,261 Shares of Medtronic PLC $MDT
feed.summary: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC has reduced its stake in Medtronic PLC (NYSE:MDT) by 28.9%, selling 17,261 shares during the fourth quarter, leaving them with 42,426 shares valued at $4.075 million. feed.title: Has Coca-Cola cracked the volume code?
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Co. reported a significant improvement in unit case volume sales, rising 3% in the first quarter of fiscal 2026, building on previous quarters' 1% growth. This volume increase, coupled with a 2% price/mix growth, contributed to strong financial results, including an 18% increase in net income and a 12% rise in quarterly sales to $12.5 billion. The company attributes its success to brand power, system reach, strategic product innovation, and a focus on affordability, particularly for lower-income consumers.

feed.title: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC Decreases Stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH
feed.summary: GC Wealth Management RIA LLC has reduced its stake in Parker-Hannifin Corporation by 14.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 1,947 shares and holding 11,353 shares valued at $9.98 million. Despite this, other institutional investors have increased their holdings, and company insiders have recently sold shares totaling over $1.7 million. Analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Parker-Hannifin, with an average price target of $1,000.60.

feed.title: Applied Materials Faces New China Export Halt And Revenue Exposure Questions
feed.summary: The U.S. Department of Commerce has halted shipments of advanced semiconductor manufacturing tools to China's Hua Hong, directly impacting Applied Materials' sales and raising questions about its revenue exposure and supply chain flexibility. This action intensifies export controls between the U.S. and China, potentially affecting Applied Materials' revenue mix and increasing regulatory risk for the company. Investors need to monitor company updates on mitigation strategies, customer diversification, and the potential for similar restrictions on other Chinese foundries.

feed.title: Builders FirstSource, Inc. Sees Revision in Its Stock Evaluation Amid Market Fluctuations
feed.summary: Builders FirstSource, Inc. has adjusted its valuation metrics, now showing a P/E ratio of 22 and a price-to-book value of 2.21. The company has experienced a challenging year with a -27.47% return, significantly underperforming the S&P 500's 29.12% gain. This performance is set against various valuation metrics of its industry peers, highlighting a diverse competitive landscape.

feed.title: Apple, Synopsys, Coca-Cola And An Industrial Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: CNBC's "Final Trades" segment featured several stock picks from investment experts. Brian Belski recommended Waste Connections Inc (WCN) due to strong Q1 results, while Stephanie Link chose Synopsys Inc (SNPS). Joseph M. Terranova picked The Coca-Cola Company (KO) after its better-than-expected Q1 earnings, and Joshua Brown named Apple Inc. (AAPL) ahead of its upcoming earnings report.

feed.title: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) reported stronger-than-expected Q1 2026 earnings, with an EPS of $2.35 against an expectation of $2.27, and increased sales across all reportable segments despite global uncertainty. The company's strategy of focusing on growth investments and market share gains, along with disciplined capital allocation, contributed to these results. Sherwin-Williams also discussed its updated outlook, anticipating continued raw material inflation due to the Middle East conflict, prompting targeted pricing actions while maintaining unchanged full-year sales and earnings guidance.

feed.title: CDW (CDW) Expected to Announce Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: CDW (NASDAQ:CDW) is expected to announce its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Wednesday, May 6th, with analysts forecasting earnings of $2.26 per share and revenue of $5.4622 billion. The company last reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, exceeding analyst estimates with $2.57 EPS and $5.51 billion in revenue. CDW recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.63 per share, and analysts currently rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $160.43.

feed.title: Network Security Sandbox Market to Reach USD 567.00 Billion
feed.summary: The global network security sandbox market is projected to reach USD 567.00 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 53.46% from 2026. This significant growth is attributed to the increasing sophistication of cyberattacks, demand for secure data infrastructure, and regulatory compliance pressures. North America leads the market with a 40% share, driven by high cybersecurity investments and AI adoption.

feed.title: Applied Materials Stock Surged 70%, Here’s Why
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) stock surged 65% over six months, driven by an AI-driven growth inflection and a 16% rise in net income margin, along with a 43% jump in its P/E multiple. Despite a slight revenue dip and ongoing market concerns like decelerating orders and US-China export controls, the market is pricing in a strong AI recovery. The article highlights both bull and bear cases for the stock, emphasizing the importance of diversified portfolios to manage single-stock risk.

feed.title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, exceeding expectations with reported EPS of $2.01 against an anticipated $1.98. The company saw robust RevPAR and net unit growth, driven by strengthening demand and strategic brand expansion. Despite geopolitical uncertainties, particularly in the Middle East, Hilton maintains optimistic full-year guidance, emphasizing its asset-light fee-based model and significant investments in AI and technology for enhanced guest experience and operational efficiency.

feed.title: Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Ecolab Inc. reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with adjusted diluted EPS growth of 13%, driven by accelerating momentum across its portfolio including significant growth in Global High-Tech and Life Sciences. Despite dynamic operating environments and rising commodity costs, the company expects to offset these impacts through pricing and volume growth, maintaining its full-year EPS growth outlook of 12% to 15%. Strategic acquisitions like CoolIT and Ovivo are anticipated to be key growth engines, particularly in high-tech markets, and Ecolab remains confident in achieving its 20% operating income margin target by 2027.

feed.title: CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: CoStar Group (NASDAQ:CSGP) reported exceptional Q1 2026 earnings, delivering its 60th consecutive quarter of double-digit revenue growth with adjusted EBITDA doubling year-over-year. The Homes.com investment is performing strongly, showing an 11x return on investment for member agents and significant consumer engagement with Homes AI. The company also saw robust growth in its commercial segment, international operations, and Matterport, while reaffirming its full-year revenue guidance and increasing adjusted EBITDA and EPS guidance.

feed.title: Centene Corporation (NYSE:CNC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Centene Corporation reported strong Q1 2026 adjusted diluted EPS of $3.37, exceeding expectations and leading to an increased full-year EPS outlook of greater than $3.40. The company saw solid performance across its Medicaid, Medicare, and Marketplace segments, driven by operational improvements and strategic management of medical costs and trends. Centene also highlighted its focus on program integrity, management of risk adjustment in the Marketplace, and ongoing efforts to optimize its balance sheet.

feed.title: CMS Energy Corporation (NYSE:CMS) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: CMS Energy Corporation reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, exceeding expectations with an EPS of $1.13. The company reaffirmed its full-year guidance and long-term outlook, driven by a constructive regulatory environment, strategic investments in grid reliability and renewables, and significant load growth in Michigan, including new data center and manufacturing contracts. Management emphasized continued focus on customer affordability and a consistent track record of delivering shareholder returns.

feed.title: Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Omnicom Group Inc. reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with an adjusted EPS of $1.90, exceeding expectations, and revenue from core operations growing by 3.9% organically. The company highlighted successful integration of Interpublic, leading to significant cost reduction synergies and new business wins like IBM and GSK. Omnicom is strategically repositioning its portfolio for growth, divesting non-core assets, and leveraging its AI-enabled Omni platform to enhance client services and operational efficiency.

feed.title: Franklin Resources, Inc. (NYSE:BEN) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Franklin Resources, Inc. (NYSE:BEN) reported a strong Q2 2026 with $16.9 billion in long-term net inflows, beating earnings expectations with an EPS of $0.71. The company highlighted significant contributions from private markets, retail SMAs, ETFs, and solutions, and emphasized its multiyear strategy focusing on diversified growth and client partnerships. Key discussions included robust alternative fundraising, the growth of its Canvas platform, advancements in AI applications, and a strategic outlook for continued margin expansion and digital asset engagement.

feed.title: Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Avery Dennison Corporation reported strong Q1 2026 results with organic sales up 1% and adjusted EPS up 7% year over year, exceeding expectations. The growth was driven by the Materials Group, offsetting a softer Solutions Group performance, and strategic investments like an incremental $75 million in Williard to expand their Intelligent Labels platform. Challenges include raw material inflation, which the company is addressing through price increases and productivity, and a temporary slowdown in logistics within Intelligent Labels, expected to rebound in the second half of the year with major food and apparel rollouts.

feed.title: Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE) reported its Q1 2026 earnings, missing EPS expectations with $1.80 against an anticipated $1.88, despite high single-digit revenue growth driven by its Americas nonresidential business and acquisitions. The company affirmed its organic revenue growth outlook of 2% to 4% and adjusted EPS of $8.70 to $8.90 for the year, while raising its reported revenue outlook to 6% to 8% to include the DCI acquisition. An ERP implementation in a legacy mechanical business significantly impacted International segment organic revenue and margins, though the company expects to recover this shortfall by year-end.

feed.title: The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, exceeding expectations with EPS of $0.86 against an anticipated $0.812. The company achieved 3% volume growth, gained value share for the 20th consecutive quarter, and expanded comparable operating margin despite a complex external economic environment. Executives Henrique Braun and John Murphy discussed regional performance, strategic focus on consumer-centricity and digital capabilities, and an updated 2026 guidance anticipating accelerated EPS growth.

feed.title: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE:IVZ) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Invesco Ltd. reported Q1 2026 earnings, missing EPS expectations at $0.57 against an anticipated $0.58. Despite market volatility, the company achieved $21.8 billion in net long-term inflows, marking its 11th consecutive quarter of net inflows, driven by strong performance in ETFs, fixed income, and its China JV. Invesco addressed increased competition for its QQQ ETF, emphasizing its strong brand, liquidity, and minimal impact on current fee structures, while outlining strategic priorities focused on personalization, income generation, international growth, private markets, and AI integration to drive profitable growth and improve operating margins.

feed.title: Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ:INCY) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ: INCY) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, with net sales up 20% year-over-year, driven by robust demand across its portfolio including Jakafi and Opzelura. The company highlighted significant pipeline advancements, including regulatory submissions for povorcitinib in hidradenitis suppurativa and positive Phase III results for povorcitinib in nonsegmental vitiligo, positioning Incyte for growth beyond its cornerstone product, Jakafi. Strategic leadership appointments and a focus on expanding its hematology, oncology, and immunology franchises underscore the company's commitment to long-term growth and market diversification.

feed.title: Xylem Inc. (NYSE:XYL) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Xylem Inc. reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, beating earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.12 against an anticipated $1.09. The company reaffirmed its full-year guidance, expecting revenue growth of 2% to 3% and an EBITDA margin of 22.9% to 23.3%. Key highlights include a new $1.5 billion share repurchase authorization and the acquisition of a German firm specializing in water quality instruments, enhancing Xylem's role in digital and service solutions.

feed.title: F5, Inc. (NASDAQ:FFIV) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: F5, Inc. (NASDAQ:FFIV) reported strong Q2 fiscal year 2026 results, exceeding earnings expectations with EPS of $3.90 against an expected $3.47 and 11% revenue growth. The company raised its fiscal year 2026 revenue outlook to 7-8% growth, driven by increasing demand from hybrid multicloud adoption, expanding threat landscapes, and the inflection of AI inference. F5 highlighted its leadership in application delivery and security, especially with new AI-powered capabilities and its unique ability to support diverse environments.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Fair Isaac Corporation reported strong Q2 2026 results with revenues up 39% year-over-year and increased fiscal year 2026 guidance. The company highlighted significant growth in its Scores segment, particularly from B2B mortgage origination, and continued strong performance in its Software segment driven by FICO Platform. Discussions also focused on the strategic pricing adjustments for FICO Score 10T to encourage adoption in the mortgage market and FICO's competitive stance against VantageScore.

feed.title: Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation (NYSE:MX) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation (NYSE:MX) reported its Q1 2026 earnings, discussing a multi-year transformation strategy aimed at returning to profitable growth. The company saw stronger-than-usual Q1 revenue due to a one-time sales incentive and is accelerating R&D with plans to launch 55 new generation products in 2026. While financial improvement is expected to be gradual, new generation products are projected to comprise 10% of total revenue by Q4 2026, up from 2% in 2025.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ:CZR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment, Inc. (NASDAQ:CZR) reported Q1 2026 earnings, missing EPS expectations with consolidated net revenues of $2.9 billion, a 3% increase year-over-year. The company highlighted improvements in Las Vegas operating trends, growth in its regional segment, and record Q1 revenues and EBITDA in its Digital segment. Management discussed future strategies including continued capital investments in Las Vegas, a stable outlook for regional properties after major CapEx projects, and leveraging their Caesars Rewards database for digital customer acquisition, aiming for 20% top-line revenue growth in Digital.

feed.title: Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ:SBUX) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Starbucks reported strong Q2 2026 earnings, with both top and bottom line growth for the first time in over two years, driven by a 9% increase in consolidated revenue to $9.5 billion and global comparable sales up 6%. The company raised its fiscal 2026 guidance for global comp growth to 5% or better and EPS to $2.25-$2.45, reflecting confidence in its "Back to Starbucks" strategy and operational improvements. Key drivers included robust North America performance, international market recovery, menu innovation, and the enhanced Starbucks Rewards program.

feed.title: Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR) reported solid Q1 2026 results, with sales up 3%, adjusted operating income up 7%, and adjusted EPS rising to $1.22, exceeding expectations. The company reaffirmed its full-year adjusted EPS guidance, narrowing the range to $5.30 to $5.40, and expects total sales to be up 2% to 4%. Pentair also highlighted its balanced water portfolio, strategic execution driven by its Business System, and commitment to shareholder value through share repurchases and achieving "Dividend King" status.
